leadText: Punching Glove (Japanese: パンチグローブ Punch Glove) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Punching Glove increases the power of punching moves by 10% and prevents contact with targets done by those moves. This item's effect additionally stacks with Iron Fist .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This protective glove boosts the power of the holder's punching moves and prevents direct contact with targets.

This item's effect additionally stacks with Iron Fist . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This protective glove boosts the power of the holder's punching moves and prevents direct contact with targets. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Zapapico (from a Pokémon League representative after defeating 7 Trainers in East Province (Area Three) ) Delibird Presents ( Mesagoza Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges )
